publishedAbstract: * Ceph MGR is down in an ODF 4.X Cluster with `Cannot assign requested address` ~~~ $ ceph health detail HEALTH_ERR no active mgr; Module 'prometheus' has failed: OSError("No socket could be created-- (('1.1.1.1', 9283): [Errno 99] Cannot assign requested address)",) [WRN] MGR_DOWN: no active mgr [ERR] MGR_MODULE_ERROR: Module 'prometheus' has failed: OSError("No socket could be created-- (('1.1.1.1', 9283): [Errno 99] Cannot assign requested address)",) Module 'prometheus' has failed: OSError("No socket could be created-- (('1.1.1.1', 9283): [Errno 99] Cannot assign requested address)",) ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph MGR is down in an ODF 4.X Cluster with "Cannot assign requested address" error
